question: Which statement is supported by the chart data on browser usage share?

options.A: Chrome has the largest market share among the browsers shown.
options.B: Edge has the smallest market share among the browsers shown.
options.C: Firefox and Others together account for more than 20% of usage.
options.D: Safari and Edge have nearly identical market shares.

explanation: From the labels, Chrome has the highest share (73%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Safari is largest when relying on visual comparison.
